findings: scripts/human_decision_record.py implements human_required state decision record management
create_record and validate_record with CLI support
T10 guard enforcement: human_decision_recorded AND decision_evidence_attached
validate_record checks missing records, invalid JSON, missing fields, invalid decision_type, missing evidence
Record schema includes schema_version, task_id, decision_type, decision_reason, decision_maker, decision_timestamp, evidence_files, gpt_verdict_context, exit_conditions_met
limitations: human decision record not yet integrated with state_machine_runtime.py T10 runtime guard - currently template/tool implementation only, not full path execution state machine
decision_maker is currently just a string identifier without signature confirmation, user collection confirmation record binding - could add user confirmation pathway hash in high-risk scenarios
evidence pack file run_id and manifest run_id differ from prompt run_id - not affecting review but should unify pack run_id, review run_id, and report metadata
